info.name: ClassMate API
info.description:
Manual API testing collection for ClassMate — Student Community & Collaboration Platform.

Base URL is stored in the `baseUrl` environment variable.

How to use:
1. Import this collection into Postman
2. Create an environment with `baseUrl` = https://e2526-wads-b4ac.csbihub.id
3. Run `POST /api/auth/firebase` first, then copy the `session` cookie — Postman handles this automatically when 'Automatically follow redirects' is on
4. For endpoints that require auth, the session cookie is sent automatically by Postman after login

header.description: Replace with a real Firebase ID token from the client SDK

query.description: Search by name, university, or major

item.name: POST /api/forums/posts — Create post (missing required field — expect 400)
POST /api/forums/posts — Create post (toxic content — expect moderation block)
GET /api/forums/replies — List replies for a post

{
  "thread": "User A: How does binary search work?
User B: Binary search works by dividing the sorted array in half repeatedly until the target is found.
User C: The time complexity is O(log n) which makes it very efficient.
User A: Thanks! So it only works on sorted arrays?
User B: Yes, the array must be sorted for binary search to work correctly."
}
